properties.name: Feature: 2E Ascending AC
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Turns on AD&D 2E's own Ascending AC house rule (present in the ruleset's shared combat code but never registered as an option, so it was previously impossible to enable) and patches the two spots stock left unfinished: the PC sheet's combat-score box (always showed THAC0) and the NPC sheet (AC/THAC0 fields just disappear with nothing shown). Adds an Ascending AC Matrix to the character combat strip. Option defaults on, so loading the extension is enough by itself, but stays a real Options toggle. Do not use together with 2E Attack Throw (ACKS). Compatible with 2E ADV/DIS.
